channel.title: Pages on Le Hoang Vu
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Le Hoang Vu

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Introduction

I’m a final-year IT student passionate about AI, multi-agent and computer vision systems. With hands-on experience in building scalable MLOps pipelines, LLM-based applications and computer vision projects, I love turning complex problems into intelligent, modular solutions.

Education

VNU University of Engineering and Technology
Bachelor of Information and Technology; GPA: 3.69
Oct 2022 – Jan 2026

Experience

Sun Asterisk Inc
AI Engineer Fresher
May 2025 – Present

Finpros Investment Joint Stock Company
AI Engineer Intern
June 2024 – Sep 2024

HMI Laboratory (UET-VNU)
AI Research Assistant
Sep 2024 – May 2025
